results.notes: ETB now uses make_targeted_etb_trigger (effect=counter_add, +1/+1, target_filter=other_creature_you_control). Card text 'another target creature' (any controller) is approximated to other-creature-you-control because there is no cross-controller 'other creature' filter; closest legal targeting via existing helpers. Attack-trigger 'modified creature gains lifelink' rider is left out (lifelink-while-modified detection + targeting on attack).

ETB uses make_targeted_etb_trigger (effect=grant_keyword, keyword=flying, duration=end_of_turn, target_filter=other_creature_you_control). Resolves through targeting handler which emits GRANT_KEYWORD.
ETB uses make_targeted_etb_trigger (effect=bounce, target_filter=nonland_permanent, max_targets=1, optional=True). Targeting handler emits ZONE_CHANGE to owner's hand.

results.engine_gap: Villain-spell cost reduction (QUERY_COST interceptor not wired here)
results.notes: ETB now scans graveyard_<controller> for Villain cards and emits TARGET_REQUIRED with legal_targets_override + effect=graveyard_to_hand. Cost-reduction static remains unwired.

ETB uses create_target_choice + custom shocker_resolve callback. Callback emits two DAMAGE events: 2 to chosen creature and 2 to that creature's controller. 'During your turn first strike' rider is left to layered keyword system (separate from this trigger).
Already correctly implemented as static lord effect (other Villains +2/+2). Hand-size cap and end-step refill-to-8 not wired (no max_hand_size machinery).
ETB uses make_targeted_etb_trigger (effect=counter_add, +1/+1). Static draw-on-modified-creature-combat-damage left out (would need 'is_modified' tracker on damage source).
Attack trigger now scans for other Villains controlled and emits one GRANT_KEYWORD(flying, end_of_turn) per creature. No targeting needed; mass grant resolved via per-creature events.
Beginning-of-combat trigger emits GRANT_KEYWORD(flying/first strike/trample/lifelink/haste, end_of_turn) for each other Spider you control. Five keywords x N creatures => 5N events.
Tutor mechanic (search library for basic land, reveal, shuffle, place on top) requires library-search choice subsystem; not wired.
Beginning-of-combat trigger computes legal Spiders-you-control then emits TARGET_REQUIRED(effect=pump, +2/+2, legal_targets_override=spider list).
Modal ETB with two distinct target requirement modes (graveyard 4MV+ return vs exile artifact/enchantment) requires modal_etb_trigger with two different target sets per mode; not converted.

Riot grant to other Spiders works via make_keyword_grant. 'Spells/abilities can't be countered' and 'Damage can't be prevented' static rules require pipeline-level counter-prevention and damage-prevention toggles.

results.engine_gap: Per-card 'attacks-each-combat + sac-on-combat-damage' rider on reanimated target
results.notes: ETB now emits RETURN_FROM_GRAVEYARD with card_type=creature, max_mv=3 — graveyard handler creates a chooser among legal creatures and reanimates. Granting the must-attack/sac-on-damage triggers to the reanimated card is left unwired.
Life-total exchange between two players is not an existing event; conditional draw based on life delta also not wired.

results.engine_gap: exile-until-leaves with paired exiled-card return on death + simultaneous two-zone targeting
results.notes: Two-target ETB across battlefield + graveyard plus tracking-set-of-exiled-cards-returned-on-death is beyond existing exile-until-leaves machinery.
Library search by card-type with reveal-then-hand-then-shuffle requires library-search choice subsystem.
'Becomes a green Lizard creature with base P/T 4/4 and loses all abilities' requires type/ability-rewrite layer not exposed via simple events.
Basic-land tutor onto battlefield tapped requires library-search subsystem; static Mountain-count P/T scaling and LTB sac-a-land are also unwired.
Web-slinging alt-cost mechanic and basic-land tutor onto battlefield tapped both require subsystems not present in pipeline.
Multi-step library inspection plus exile-while-castable mechanic + any-color mana spending exceeds existing helpers.
Top-of-library play access plus paying life equal to mana value rather than mana cost is not implemented.
Replacement-style ETB with hand reveal and chosen-type cost modifier needs a card-type cost interceptor and a reveal choice flow.
'Choose one' with two different target sets requires modal_etb_trigger; current targeting handler operates on a single target list per choice.
'Choose one or both' modal needs the multi-mode target chooser; existing helpers only support single mode.
Pairing an exile target with the enchantment's lifetime requires the exile-until-leaves replacement effect; targeting alone is not enough.

Beginning-of-combat trigger now emits TARGET_REQUIRED with effects=[grant_keyword first_strike, grant_keyword vigilance], optional=True. Multi-effect support handles both keywords on single chosen creature.
P/T 8/8 conditional already wired via QUERY_POWER/TOUGHNESS interceptors. Hexproof-while-controlling-Villain rider needs dynamic ability grant tied to a count predicate; not converted.
Each player simultaneously reveals top, then loses life equal to the other's revealed MV, then both reveal cards go to hand. No simultaneous cross-player reveal flow.
ETB uses make_targeted_etb_trigger with min_targets=0, max_targets=2, optional=True, effect=counter_add. Counter-doubling on attack and transform back-side are left out.
Top-5 look + select-up-to-2-of-type-to-hand requires reveal-and-pick subsystem for filtered selection.
P/T = land-count already wired via QUERY_POWER/TOUGHNESS. Block-restriction predicate and activated-from-graveyard self+land reanimate not wired.
Top-5 look + select-creature-to-battlefield (rest to bottom random) needs an impulsive-style reveal-pick handler with battlefield destination.
Per-player upkeep choice that conditionally produces mana scaling with counters needs multi-player choice + dynamic mana production.
Already correctly implemented as QUERY_POWER override returning greatest mana value among permanents you control.

results.engine_gap: web-slinging detection + X counters from returned creature MV
results.notes: Sensational Save requires detecting which alt-cost was used and reading the returned-creature's MV. No alt-cost provenance tracker.
Flying-while-modified already wired via QUERY_ABILITIES interceptor. Ward 2 keyword grant is handled by core ability system.

results.engine_gap: tracking spell-from-non-hand or land-this-turn + targeted damage
results.notes: Conditional end-step targeted damage requires per-turn 'cast-from-non-hand' tracker and a target chooser that runs only when condition met.
Type-changing animation effect (non-Equipment artifact -> artifact creature 3/3) plus untap requires layered type/ability rewrite system.
Pay {U} optional cost gating a follow-up unblockable trigger needs optional-cost-then-trigger flow which is not wired generically.
ETB uses make_targeted_etb_trigger (effect=damage, amount=5, target_filter=creature). Activated discard-self destroy-artifact handled at activation site.
Optional pay {G} gating a basic-land tutor with reveal/hand/shuffle requires both optional-cost prompt and library-search subsystem.
